overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, digital billboards, overpasses, and wet reflective surfaces. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing dense urban architecture with heavy artificial lighting and towering advertisements.

events.description: approaching the escalator and overpass structure ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet city sidewalk toward an escalator structure

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying a woman's face
concrete escalator and stair structure leading to overpass
tall modern glass building with illuminated windows
street light pole with yellow safety bands

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night, walking toward a large escalator structure. A prominent vertical digital billboard displays a woman's face on a distant building, while modern glass towers rise in the background. The street is empty of pedestrians with sparse vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under transit overpass with digital ceiling

events.description: enters the covered walkway under the overpass
vehicles pass by on the right side under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, passing piles of trash bags on the left side

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past under the overpass

entered.detail: illuminated ceiling with abstract blue and green digital patterns
piles of garbage bags and debris stacked against the wall
large concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Moving under the overpass, the scene becomes semi-covered with a striking digital ceiling displaying abstract patterns. Piles of trash bags line the left wall while vehicles pass on the right. The environment is sheltered from the open sky, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and transit barriers

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open intersection area
approaches the crosswalk barrier as pedestrians wait nearby

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk area, navigating around guard rails

notable_agents.action: person standing near the crosswalk guard rail

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard displaying AVANTE advertisement with figures
red and white striped barrier rails at the crosswalk entrance
tall blue street light pole with bright white lamp

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection with the AVANTE billboard visible on the left. The camera approaches crosswalk barriers where a pedestrian stands waiting. A blue street light pole marks the transition to the open street area with visible traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: large neon-lit intersection with multiple digital billboards

events.description: enters the large open intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards
crossing the wide intersection as vehicles pass through

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection surrounded by towering digital advertisements and neon lights

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large vertical billboard with VANDAL text and character image
array of massive digital screens covering the building facade ahead
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a vast intersection dominated by massive digital billboards including the prominent VANDAL advertisement. The ground features yellow crosswalk patterns while vehicles navigate the crossing. The AVANTE billboard recedes into the distance as the camera progresses across the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with corporate building and street art

events.description: exits the intersection onto the opposite sidewalk
large V graffiti mural comes into view on the left building wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the V graffiti and approaching the softsys building entrance

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large street art mural featuring a stylized V with mechanical wings and skull imagery
building entrance with illuminated green SOFTSYS signage
small illuminated vending booth on the sidewalk
tall blue street light pole with bright white lamp on the right side

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera walks along the opposite sidewalk where a prominent V graffiti mural covers the left wall. The green SOFTSYS building sign illuminates the entrance ahead, while a pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks further down the path. The scene maintains the dense urban cyberpunk atmosphere with continued neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, rain-slicked city sidewalk into a sheltered urban underpass before emerging back into a wide metropolitan intersection. It begins by advancing toward a large escalator structure under the gaze of a towering digital billboard and distant glass skyscrapers. As the camera moves beneath an overpass, the open sky is replaced by a tunnel-like atmosphere featuring a digital ceiling of abstract patterns and piles of trash lining the walls. The scene then opens back into the night air as the camera exits the shelter, passing a blue street light pole and an AVANTE billboard. Finally, the movement concludes at a busy crosswalk where a lone pedestrian waits amidst the flow of city traffic.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, bustling urban intersection into a narrower, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins by traversing a vast plaza dominated by massive digital billboards, including a prominent VANDAL advertisement, as the camera moves across yellow crosswalk patterns amidst navigating vehicles. As the AVANTE billboard recedes into the distance, the perspective shifts from the open crossing toward the opposite sidewalk. The scene then narrows as the camera passes a large V graffiti mural on the left wall, moving toward the green glow of a SOFTSYS building sign. Finally, the path extends further down the street, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket into the dense, artificial light of the cyberpunk cityscape.
